prefillPrompt: Create a Meta ad for our summer sale

hero.headline: Launch campaigns from WhatsApp.
hero.headlineMuted: Write a message. Get a creative. Go live in 60 seconds.
hero.subhead: Tell Toffu what you want to advertise. It builds the creative or campaign, and pushes it live to Meta or Google Ads. No dashboards. No back and forth. Just chat.

demo.content: Create a Meta ad for our summer sale

**Meta Ad Ready**

Headline: "Summer Sale Is Live"
Primary text: "Shop our biggest sale of the year. Up to 40% off. Free shipping over $50. Limited time only."
CTA: Shop Now | Landing page: yourdomain.com/summer-sale

Ad uploaded to your Meta Ads account. Paused for your review.

Say "go live" and I'll activate it.
Now create a Google search campaign for the same sale, $50/day, targeting the US

**Google Search Campaign Ready**

Campaign: "Summer Sale 2026"
Budget: $50/day | Targeting: United States | Bidding: Maximize Conversions

**Ad Group: Summer Sale**
- 8 keywords (EXACT + PHRASE): "summer sale", "summer deals 2026", "buy summer collection" and 5 more
- 3 headlines: "Summer Sale Is Live", "Up to 40% Off This Summer", "Shop the Summer Sale Now"
- 2 descriptions: "Limited-time summer deals on everything you need. Free shipping over $50." | "Shop now and save big. Sale ends soon."

Campaign is paused for your review.

Say "go live" and I'll enable it.

howItWorks.title: Three steps from idea to live campaign.

steps.title: Send a message
steps.desc: Describe your campaign in plain language. What you're promoting, budget, target audience. No forms, no dashboards.

steps.title: Toffu builds it
steps.desc: Toffu generates the full campaign or ad creative. Keywords, headlines, descriptions, visuals. Everything ready for review.

steps.title: Go live
steps.desc: Approve and Toffu pushes it live to Meta Ads or Google Ads. You stay in WhatsApp the entire time.

items.title: Meta ad creatives
items.desc: Tell Toffu what to promote. It generates the visual, headline, and primary text. Then uploads it directly to your Meta Ads account.

items.title: Google Search campaigns
items.desc: Describe your goal and budget. Toffu builds the full campaign: keywords, match types, ad copy, bidding strategy. Ready to launch in under a minute.

items.title: Campaign targeting
items.desc: Specify your audience in plain language. Toffu translates it into the right targeting settings on Meta or Google, no platform knowledge required.

items.title: Budget and bidding
items.desc: Set a daily or lifetime budget in the chat. Toffu applies the right bidding strategy based on your campaign goal.

items.title: Review before launch
items.desc: Everything is created paused. You review the full setup, approve it, and only then does it go live. You stay in control.

items.title: Iterate in chat
items.desc: Change the headline, swap the image, adjust the budget. Just say what you want to change. Toffu updates it without you opening any platform.

afterSection.title: Toffu keeps watching.
afterSection.subhead: Once your campaign is live, Toffu monitors performance and surfaces issues before they become expensive.

items.title: Spend anomalies
items.desc: If a campaign suddenly overspends or goes to zero, Toffu flags it in WhatsApp before you notice it in the platform.

items.title: Creative fatigue alerts
items.desc: When frequency climbs and CTR drops, Toffu tells you which ad is tired and suggests what to replace it with.

items.title: Performance summaries
items.desc: Ask "how's my campaign doing?" and get a real answer: spend, conversions, CPA, and what to do next.

faq.question: Which ad platforms does this work with?
faq.answer: Meta Ads (Facebook and Instagram) and Google Ads (Search and Performance Max). More platforms coming.

faq.question: Do I need to know how to use Meta or Google Ads?
faq.answer: No. You describe what you want in plain language. Toffu handles the platform-specific setup.

faq.question: Does the campaign go live automatically?
faq.answer: No. Everything is created paused. You review the full setup in chat and approve before anything goes live.

faq.question: Can I edit the campaign after it's created?
faq.answer: Yes. Just say what you want to change in WhatsApp. Toffu updates the campaign directly on the platform.

faq.question: How does Toffu generate the visual for Meta ads?
faq.answer: Toffu generates the image based on your brief using AI, matching your brand colors and messaging. You can approve or ask for changes before it's uploaded.

faq.question: Is my ad account data safe?
faq.answer: Toffu connects via official APIs with read and write permissions you control. Nothing is shared or stored beyond what's needed to execute the task.

finalCta.title: Your next campaign is one message away.
finalCta.subhead: Right now you're switching between WhatsApp, Meta Ads, and Google Ads to do what Toffu does in a single chat. Stop switching.

seo.title: Launch Google and Meta Campaigns from WhatsApp | Toffu AI
seo.description: Create ad creatives and launch Google or Meta campaigns directly from WhatsApp. No dashboards. Write a message, get a campaign, go live in 60 seconds.
seo.ogDescription: Write a message. Get a creative. Go live on Meta or Google Ads in 60 seconds.
